reviews.comment:
Larga fila para cargar. La atención es buena. Hay para controlar presión de cubiertas. Nada para destacar, excepto que para el que no es lugareño tiene que adaptarse a las diagonales.

(Translated by Google)
Long line to load. Service is good. They have a tire pressure check station. Nothing special, except that non-locals have to navigate the diagonal lanes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtb3Bpc3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención siempre buena, sugiero observar con anticipación para cargar, en temporada y en fin de semanas se llena.

(Translated by Google)
The service is always good; I suggest checking in advance when loading up, as it gets crowded during peak season and on weekends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtd3Y2VEp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención... Pero la verdad tienen 12 surtidores y solo usan 4 de ellos para cargar tanto nafta como gasoil en plena temporada una vergüenza... Falta de personal...

(Translated by Google)
Good service... But honestly, they have 12 pumps and only use 4 of them to fill up with both gasoline and diesel during peak season—a disgrace... Staff shortage...

reviews.comment:
En lo que respecta a calidez de atención, por el personal de playa, como el.de servicompras, es MUY BUENO y siempre atentos con el.cliente.
En lo que respecta a velocidad, en comparativa con las demás YPF recorridas a lo largo de la Patagonia y Pcia de Buenos Aires, debo decir que esta fue la.más lenta de todas, a lo cual mientras esperamos, hemos llegado a pensar si estaba abierto o no, o Tal vez trabajan empleados del gobierno.

(Translated by Google)
Regarding the quality of service, both the gas station attendants and the convenience store staff are VERY GOOD and always attentive to customers.

As for speed, compared to the other YPF stations I've visited throughout Patagonia and Buenos Aires Province, I must say this was the slowest of them all. While we waited, we even wondered if it was open or not, or perhaps government employees worked there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNVBDZXZBRRAB
